title: ‘Chaos Will Follow’ Ruling Allowing Trump Firings, Dissent Predicts
summary: In a rare dissent from the bench, Justice Sonia Sotomayor said that the Supreme Court undid “centuries of political practice,” and that the court concluded that the federal government had been acting in “open defiance of the Constitution.”

title: Supreme Court Upholds Grace Period to Count Mail-In Ballots That Arrive After Election Day
summary: The justices had been asked to examine the legality of the state’s grace period for late-arriving mail-in ballots.

title: Supreme Court Rejects Trump’s Request to Appeal $5 Million Verdict in E. Jean Carroll Case
summary: President Trump had asked the justices to intervene after a jury found that he had sexually abused and defamed the writer E. Jean Carroll.

title: ‘No One’s Coming to Save Us but Us’: Gen Z Runs for Office
summary: Melat Kiros’s challenge Tuesday to Representative Diana DeGette, who was elected the year before Ms. Kiros was born, is the latest Gen Z test in a year defined by generational upheaval.

title: Why Trump Is Giving Republicans Midterms Anxiety
summary: Ahead of the midterms, Republicans have sought to focus on the issue of affordability, but the president keeps going off script. Our White House correspondent Tyler Pager explains.

title: Why Maine Has Turned Into Such a Tight Race
summary: A Times/Siena poll reveals several crosscurrents in a key contest for Senate control.

title: Voters Think A.I. Is Terrible. In Campaigns, It’s Everywhere.
summary: A.I.-generated images are the public face of this election overhaul. Behind the scenes, campaigns are using the technology to analyze voter data, craft campaign materials and write custom messages.

title: In San Francisco’s A.I. Era, Even $180,000 Tech Salaries Are No Longer Enough
summary: As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare to go public, tech workers making six figures are grousing that they cannot compete with the new A.I. elite. Some doubt they can afford to stay.

title: A.I. ‘Employees’ Might Disrupt Work in Unexpected Ways
summary: Scholars say the “unknown unknowns” of using artificial intelligence in the workplace may be undermining the technology’s advertised benefits.

title: China Emerges as a Relative Winner From Strait of Hormuz Crisis
summary: A report examines how the war in Iran has weighed on Asian economies, but left China in a more advantageous position.

title: Did American-Style ‘Gentle Parenting’ Spoil French Children?
summary: As positive parenting takes over France, one psychologist’s call for a return to discipline has set off a furious debate.

title: $22,000 Per Hour: Assistants Use a Legislative Loophole to Outearn Surgeons
summary: A law meant to end surprise medical billing has led to large paydays for some surgical assistants, who can earn far more than the doctors they help.

title: Comcast to Spin Off NBCUniversal, Ending a Long Union of Cable and Media
summary: The media business, which owns NBC News and Universal Pictures, will be separated from Comcast’s cable and internet business, following a trend in the media industry.

title: See Day-by-Day Forecast as Heat Wave Engulfs U.S. Ahead of the July 4 Weekend
summary: Dangerous heat is expected across much of the country through the July 4 weekend.

title: Europe Heat Wave: Forecasts, Warnings and How to Stay Cool
summary: A heat wave responsible for shattering numerous temperature records in Western Europe continued its shift east.

title: France Recorded 1,000 Excess Deaths During Heat Wave, Officials Say
summary: First estimates published by the national health agency listed hundreds more deaths per day compared with the daily death rate in previous months.

title: The Best Movies of 2026 So Far, and Where to Watch Them
summary: Now is a good time to catch up on films you may have missed. Our critics have thoughts.

title: NASA Aims to Catch a Falling Space Telescope and Push It Back Up
summary: A rescue mission will soon be underway for NASA’s Swift telescope.

title: Naomi Osaka Serves Up a Fashion Slam at Wimbledon
summary: The tennis player once again offered some on-court couture.

title: The Supreme Court Just Handed Trump a Dangerous New Power
summary: The Supreme Court is bestowing new powers on a president who often behaves as an aspiring autocrat.

title: The Trump Vibe Shift Was Just a Mirage
summary: The country does not love its president.

title: Migration Woes
summary: We look into the anti-immigrant movement in South Africa.

title: Could GLP-1 Drugs Help You Live Longer?
